sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30706" key="e(drai/wma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑδραί-ωμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n30706.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stay, support</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τῆς ἀληθείας</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg015.perseus-grc1:3:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">1 Ep.Ti.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.15</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
